transitions.name: start_build_environment_deployment
transitions.end_state_description: The environment deployment is in progress.

process.name: send_teamcity_request
process.description: Sends a request to TeamCity to start the build for the environment.

transitions.name: check_build_status
transitions.description: Check the build status until successful.
transitions.start_state_description: The environment deployment is in progress.
transitions.end_state_description: The environment deployment has completed successfully.

process.name: get_teamcity_build_status
process.description: Retrieves the current build status from TeamCity.

transitions.name: notify_user
transitions.description: Notify the user about the deployment status.
transitions.end_state_description: Notification was sent to the user.

process.name: notify_user
process.description: Notify the user of the successful deployment.

transitions.name: start_build_application_deployment
transitions.end_state_description: The application deployment is in progress.

process.name: send_teamcity_request
process.description: Sends a request to TeamCity to start the build for the application.

transitions.name: check_build_status
transitions.description: Check the build status until successful.
transitions.start_state_description: The application deployment is in progress.
transitions.end_state_description: The application deployment has completed successfully.

process.name: get_teamcity_build_status
process.description: Retrieves the current build status from TeamCity.

transitions.name: notify_user
transitions.description: Notify the user about the deployment status.
transitions.end_state_description: Notification was sent to the user.

process.name: notify_user
process.description: Notify the user of the successful deployment.

transitions.name: process_cancellation_request
transitions.description: Process the cancellation request for the application deployment.
transitions.start_state_description: The cancellation request has been made.
transitions.end_state_description: The application deployment has been cancelled.

process.name: send_teamcity_cancellation_request
process.description: Sends a cancellation request to TeamCity for the application deployment.

transitions.name: notify_user
transitions.description: Notify the user about the cancellation status.
transitions.start_state_description: The application deployment has been cancelled.
transitions.end_state_description: Notification was sent to the user.

process.name: notify_user
process.description: Notify the user of the cancellation.
